industry: 教育培训_少儿素质教育

applies_when: Parent asks whether a trial or consult is available without concern, age, or time facts
Parent wants a fast answer in a public comment
items.response_goal: Keep the reply warm while turning a vague kids-quality-education inquiry into usable booking facts.
do: Acknowledge the wish to book quickly
Ask for the main concern, child's age, preferred time, and whether this is a first visit
Keep the next step easy enough to answer in one message
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我孩子现在最想解决的是哪一类问题、年龄段和想来的时间，我可以先帮你把下一步收窄。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the parent provides concern and time facts, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: Parent says it is their first time or sounds unsure whether the route suits the child
Parent is unsure what class or teacher suits the child
items.response_goal: Reduce uncertainty first, then guide the parent toward a simple and safe trial path.
do: Offer a simple way to narrow the concern or route
Guide toward a low-pressure next step
avoid: Turning the reply into a hard sell
items.safe_transition: 第一次来先看适不适合很正常，我们可以先把孩子现在最卡的点和可来的时间理清楚。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the parent shares direction and timing, route to Catcher.

applies_when: Parent mentions school starting soon, a holiday window, or grade transition
Parent needs a trial before a time node
items.response_goal: Keep momentum high while collecting the exact time window and concern scope that decide whether the institution can help.
do: Ask when the node is and when the parent hopes to come
Guide the next step toward a suitable slot and route fit
avoid: Guaranteeing all peak slots are available
Pushing a package before the trial is scoped
items.safe_transition: 如果你把开学、假期或升年级时间点，还有孩子现在最想解决的部分告诉我，会更容易判断先约哪一类试听。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the parent shares date and timing, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: Parent compares packages without concern context
items.response_goal: Avoid empty price comparison by lightly recovering scope.
do: Ask what concern or route the parent is asking about
avoid: Hiding the role of concern scope
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我是更偏专注力、表达力、思维训练还是幼小衔接，价格回答会更准确一些。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the parent gives concern scope, route to Catcher.

applies_when: Parent says they came before or wants to return
Parent references the last class, trial, or child's progress
items.response_goal: Make the parent feel recognized while surfacing what they want this time.
do: Ask what they want to continue or solve this time
Guide toward a smooth re-entry point
avoid: Treating a returning family like a cold lead
Jumping straight to a hard close
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我这次更想接上哪一段，我们就能更自然地帮你收窄下一步。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the parent shares prior context, route to FollowUp or Catcher.

applies_when: Parent talks about being late, worried, or embarrassed in public
items.response_goal: Protect dignity in public while still keeping the path to help open.
do: Avoid repeating the parent's wording harshly
Offer a light path into a more specific next step
avoid: Turning a sensitive comment into a hard conversion script
items.safe_transition: 这种担心很常见，不用急着给孩子下结论。你如果愿意说下现在卡在哪和大概什么时间方便，我们可以先帮你看路径。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the parent continues with details, route to Catcher.
